backend/main.mo: Main canister logic implementing file upload, metadata management, user profiles, access control, and platform statistics.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that preserves actor state on upgrade while resetting the token map.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs to affected frontend files, components, tests, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A list of short descriptions summarizing all frontend files and their functionality.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind-based stylesheet defining color tokens, themes, and base UI variables for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entrypoint that loads the React application via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router routes, theme provider, and app layout including global UI elements.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthStatusB: Displays the user’s authentication state and profile name using Internet Identity data.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Login/logout button handling Internet Identity authentication with loading and error recovery states.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Dialog prompting first‑time authenticated users to set their profile name and saving it via backend.
frontend/src/components/files/FileUpload: UI panel for selecting a file and uploading it using chunked upload with progress, success, and error states.
frontend/src/components/files/MyFilesTab: Displays the user's uploaded files with metadata and allows copying public download links.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Main application layout with header, navigation, auth status, admin link handling, and footer.
frontend/src/features/admin/useIsAdmin.t: React Query hook that checks whether the current identity has admin privileges.
Fetches all file metadata from the backend when enabled.
frontend/src/features/files/useDownloadF: Mutation hook to download a file by token and trigger a browser download while updating stats.
frontend/src/features/files/useMyFiles.t: Fetches files uploaded by the current authenticated user.
frontend/src/features/react-query/errorM: Normalizes common error messages into user-friendly strings.
frontend/src/features/react-query/queryK: Central list of React Query keys for file and stats operations.
frontend/src/features/stats/useGlobalSta: Loads global platform statistics like total files, size, and downloads.
frontend/src/features/uploads/useChunked: Handles chunked file upload with progress tracking, error handling, and query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the authenticated or anonymous backend actor and refreshes dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity auth context, login/logout handling, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks to fetch and save the caller's user profile using an actor, with cache invalidation on save.
frontend/src/index.css: Sets Tailwind base styles and CSS variables for light/dark themes and applies global background and text colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers and mounts the root component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard showing all files with metadata, download links, and admin access checks.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Displays the user dashboard with profile loading, file upload panel, and the user's file list.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page showing platform stats, marketing text, and a button to access the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/PublicDownloadPage.ts: Handles public file downloads using a token with auto‑triggered or manual download and error handling.
frontend/src/utils/download.ts: Utility to trigger a browser file download from raw byte data by creating a Blob and link element.
frontend/src/utils/format.ts: Provides helpers to format bytes into readable units and convert timestamp bigint values to date strings.
frontend/src/utils/links.ts: Builds public download URLs and provides a clipboard copy helper with error handling.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions to get, store, and clear URL parameters with session persistence and hash support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures TailwindCSS with custom colors, typography, container settings, keyframes, and plugins for styling the frontend.
project_state.json: Defines the project’s current state, features, issues, and architectural notes for a file‑sharing website using unique public download tokens.
